---
title: "Build information"
execute:
  freeze: false
---

This table recomputes every time the site builds on GitHub Actions, so each value
reflects the date of the most recent Publish run rather than a stored snapshot. The ISO
year-week field uses the same `YYYYwWW` form as the
[ZFS pool naming convention](decisions/20260611-zpool-naming-convention.md).

```{python}
import datetime

import pandas as pd

today = datetime.date.today()

pd.DataFrame(
    [
        ("Build date (ISO 8601)", today.isoformat()),
        ("ISO year-week", today.strftime("%Gw%V")),
        ("Day of year", today.strftime("%j")),
        ("Weekday", today.strftime("%A")),
        ("Days into 2026", str((today - datetime.date(2026, 1, 1)).days)),
    ],
    columns=["Field", "Value"],
).set_index("Field")
```
